name: High-support complement orbit/local maximum lemma
proved_here: For w=12 and complement sizes 0..5, the number of contained dodecads depends only on complement size.
For w=16 and complement sizes 0..2, the number of contained hexadecads depends only on complement size.
Equal-on-support ratios are <=1, strictly <1 on proper boundary faces.
The Hessian at equal-on-support is strictly negative on the tangent space for the checked representatives.
remaining_gap: A global proof that equal-on-support is the global maximizer on every high-support face, not merely a local maximizer with strong numerical KKT evidence.
